hotel_name: Studio M Arabian Plaza Hotel & Hotel Apartments

reviews.title: disappointing
reviews.text: Very bad service experience. No toilet kits were provided and basic essential items were missing. Everything came with extra charges. Overall, very disappointing and not worth the money.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback regarding your recent stay at Studio M Hotel Arabian Plaza.

We are truly sorry to hear that your experience did not meet your expectations. Please accept our sincere apologies for the inconvenience caused, particularly regarding the availability of basic amenities such as toiletry kits and essential in-room items.

At Studio M Hotel Arabian Plaza, we aim to provide a comfortable and seamless experience for all our guests, and it is disappointing to know that we fell short in your case. Your comments regarding service experience and additional charges have been noted and shared with the relevant departments for review and improvement.

We truly appreciate your feedback, as it helps us identify areas where we can do better. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in the future and provide you with a more comfortable and improved experience.

Warm regards,
Hotel Management
Studio M Hotel Arabian Plaza

reviews.title: Disrespectful Management & No Guest Privacy
reviews.negatives:
I’ve stayed at Studio M Arabian Plaza for a long time only because of the location, not because of the service. Guests are treated differently, rules change depending on the management staff, and if you complain, it can feel like they hold grudges or take revenge.

The most concerning part is that guest privacy does not feel respected. Personal information and private matters seem to be discussed openly, which made me very uncomfortable.

The only professional and respectful person in my experience was the General Manager, who listens calmly and treats guests with respect.

Overall, the environment feels unprofessional, inconsistent, and stressful instead of welcoming.

reviews.title: the worset hotel in dubai
reviews.text: The hotel service was very poor and did not meet basic expectations. The room and common areas were not clean, which made the stay uncomfortable. In addition, there was constant noise from neighboring rooms that disturbed our rest, and no action was taken to control it. On top of that, the staff were unhelpful and unprofessional in their attitude, which only made the experience worse. Overall, it was a very disappointing stay.

reviews.title: Front desk service is very terrible.
reviews.text: I booked one bed apt.  However, front desk personal, put me in the 26 Square meter room instead one bed apt??  The difference price will sell to the another customer. Very smooth and interesting deception. Never visit again.  Dr. Charles
reviews.response:

May we have another opportunity to welcome you again for another great experience.

Yours sincerely,
Amr Hussein

reviews.title: Disappointed, forcing to pay illegal security deposit
reviews.text: Unfortunately I do not recommend this hotel because of the mistreatment with the guest and the lack of experience or professional receptionist. I asked about front office manager who lied to me that's he is tge reception manager but in the fact he is a security manager his name :Yasser is Pakistani nationality. This person does not know the meaning of respect and professionalism being an employee in the tourism sector is your main job is the comfort of the guest, but unfortunately I was shocked by this rude, impolite and improper deal and did not accept it especially in front of my family, as he forced me to pay a security deposit for the hotel so I can get my room which i paid for it already online. I explained to him that this is illegal against the regulations and laws of tourism in the UAE, what was his only answer if you do not pay as security deposit will not give you a room and you can leave the hotel if you refused to pay. I will not stop at writing this comment, but I will escalate the matter so as to make sure not to repeat this reality again with any guest and teach them a lesson in how to deal and welcome the guests better insulting them in front of the family.
reviews.response:

Thank you for sharing your feedback following your stay with Studio M Arabian Plaza. Although your experience with us has not been a good one, we would like to inform you the hotel rule to keep security deposit is to utilize this amount in case of any emergency. Our manager on duty was following our hotel rule. Meanwhile, the security deposit is refundable at check-out time. 

Thank you for understanding and we are looking forward to welcoming you again to our property. 

Yours sincerely,

Ursula Chidiac | General Manager

reviews.title: Very bad experience
reviews.negatives:
I booked rooms for my friends, but unfortunately the experience was very unpleasant. There was a very strong and uncomfortable smell in the reception area and throughout the corridors.

When we vacated the rooms, I informed the reception team about this issue. It seemed like the smell was coming from the nearby Nesto Hypermarket. Instead of resolving the root cause, air fresheners were used to cover the odor, which made the situation even worse and caused headaches for us.

Overall, it was a very bad experience, and I would not recommend staying here unless this issue is properly addressed.

reviews.title: I am writing to express my disappointment regarding my recent stay at Studio M Arabian Plaz
reviews.text:
Stayed 1 night at Studio M Arabian Plaza. Booked a smoking room with a king bed but was given a non-smoking room and bed size was small , when asked told all beds are the same size, while Agoda still showed availability. Mattress was queen size (160 cm), not king as booked. Bathroom had blocked sink, faulty shower, and no toiletries. Reception kept me on hold and only said “hotel full.” Overall disappointing for an Agoda Diamond account holder.
Not recommended for guests expecting reliability from listings.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Shaizur,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We sincerely apologize for the inconveniences you experienced during your recent stay at Studio M Hotel Arabian Plaza. We understand how frustrating it must have been to receive a non-smoking room with a smaller bed than booked, as well as the issues with the bathroom facilities and lack of toiletries.

Please be assured that your concerns have been shared with our team to ensure these matters are addressed and such discrepancies are avoided in the future. We value your loyalty as an Agoda Diamond member and regret that your experience did not meet your expectations or the standards we strive to uphold.

We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back and provide a seamless and comfortable stay in the future.


Yours sincerely,
Amr Hussein 
General Manager

reviews.title: If you care about your health, don’t stay at this hotel.
reviews.positives: I didn't like anything about the hotel. This is my second time staying here, and all I can say is that it was dirty.
reviews.negatives: The property was extremely dirty. On our first night, we stayed in a room with insects, but we didn’t notice until the morning when one crawled down from the ceiling. We immediately went to the reception to request a room change, and they gave us one without insects, but it was still dirty. As soon as I laid down on the bed, I felt my skin itching from bugs. Overall, the hotel is old, the carpet is filthy, and the shower doesn’t drain properly, leaving water all over the toilet floor. To make things worse, there was a strong smell of drainage throughout the parking lot (B2). Even though we were offered a free dinner for one night and a 4-hour extension as an apology, when it comes to hygiene and health, it's something we really have to reconsider.

reviews.text:
I am writing to follow up on my previous email regarding the AED 100 deposit refund related to my stay on 23-08-2025 (Confirmation No. ***, Room ***). It is disappointing that I have not received any acknowledgment or response to my earlier communication.

The delay in refund has already caused a cheque bounce and a related penalty, which I had clearly informed your staff about. Furthermore, the lack of courtesy shown by your team at Studio M Hotel Arabian Plaza, including unreturned calls and ignored follow-ups, reflects poorly on the service quality.

I kindly request you to address this matter immediately and provide a clear update on the refund status. Your prompt attention to this issue is expected and appreciated.

Niranjan B
***
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Niranjan,

Thank you for your message and for allowing us the opportunity to clarify this matter.

Please be informed that we have already processed the refund from our side within the required timeframe. Once processed, the transaction is handed over to your issuing bank, and the time it takes for the amount to reflect in your account may vary depending on their internal procedures.

We kindly recommend contacting your bank directly to confirm the status of the refund. To assist them in tracing the transaction more efficiently, please provide them with the refund reference number we have already shared in our earlier email.

Rest assured, if any further details are required from our side to support your follow-up with the bank, we will be more than happy to provide them promptly.

We truly value your understanding and patience in this matter and remain at your service should you need any additional assistance.


Yours sincerely,
Amr Hussein 
General Manager

The guest was dissatisfied with the property, as she is a lady and expressed that she did not feel safe, especially since most of the hotel guests were men. Additionally, she found the bed sheets to be extremely dirty and had to lay her own towels on the bed to be able to sleep. As a result, she decided to check out the next day, having stayed only one night. reviews.text:
Disappointing Experience – Lack of Basic Amenities and Supportive Staff

I had a disappointing experience during my recent stay. There was no supportive staff, and I had to request even the most basic items such as dental and toilet kits.

I booked the room through Agoda for the same day, but since same-day booking wasn’t available, I booked it for the next day assuming I could check in early by paying early check-in charges. When I arrived at the hotel around 5 a.m., I was informed that early check-in was only available from 7 a.m. with an additional fee, or I had to pay the full day’s rent. As I urgently needed rest before an important meeting at 10 a.m., I ended up paying the full rate for just two hours.

To make matters worse, the room lacked basic amenities like a bathing kit, dental kit, and slippers. The staff also behaved in a rather judgmental manner, which is not something one would expect from a hotel in Dubai.

Overall, the experience did not meet the standards expected for the price or location.

Yours sincerely,

reviews.text: I paid for a non smoking room but was given a smoking room despite telling the receptionist that myself and my daughter were asthmatics, she promised to have us moved to a nob smoking area several days went by and no room changes were made neither was there any communication as to why we weren't being given the room we had paid for and also even after me telling them that my daughter's asthma was affected by the smell of cigarettes on the corridor and the room itself. We then found som cockroaches in the fridge and some stains on the bedding. On checkout day, I was told that there was some minor damage to the sofa arm, I was travelling with three children so i cannot say if it was due to them or if it was already there as i hadn't noticed anything myself. I was charged 500 dhirams (£114) because apparently they had to call out a 'technician' to repair it! Shocking way to treat a guest and just another thing that is symbolic of Dubai where they try to fleece every penny off you as I wasn't given an invoice to show the actual charges of the repair work. Location is in the middle of nowhere and taxis to and from the apartment were expensive but necessary as I didn't drive. I wouldn't stay here again, the lack of customer care other guests have mentioned was not witness by myself nor my family.

reviews.title: Disrespectful Management & No Guest Privacy
reviews.text:
I’ve stayed at Studio M Arabian Plaza for a long time only because of the location, not because of the service. Guests are treated differently, rules change depending on the management staff, and if you complain, it can feel like they hold grudges or take revenge.

The most concerning part is that guest privacy does not feel respected. Personal information and private matters seem to be discussed openly, which made me very uncomfortable.

The only professional and respectful person in my experience was the General Manager, who listens calmly and treats guests with respect.

Overall, the environment feels unprofessional, inconsistent, and stressful instead of welcoming.

reviews.title: If I go back , I would choose another hotel for the same price
reviews.negatives:
I want to write a lot of things. 1) It is better to change the money outside before you get to the hotel, because they will not allow you to enter the room, leave your bags and go outside to change the money, because they will change you at a lower rate.
2) They don't know what tidying up the room means. At least twice, we told the reception that the room needed to be cleaned, but they only fixed the bed linen (they did not change the bed linen).
3) There are no towels, robes or any other items in the room. You will have to go to the reception many times to get towels.
4) Do not make the mistake of buying a tour from the tour operator sitting at the reception desk. On the first day, we were going to the desert, the driver was talking on the phone, which is why the accident happened. We got a lot of damage but 0 attention. They only offered us a discount on the desert tour the next day and that's probably why the tour turned out to be terrible. The driver didn't talk to us, if I asked something, he turned his back on me, dinner and dances were included in the price of the tour, but it was horrible and humiliating the guest. Because of the discount, they took us to the most horrible camp.
5) Breakfast was the same every day. Tasteless snacks.
If I go back, I would choose another hotel for the same price. 
There is also many other things but it’s impossible to write everything.

reviews.title: Unprofessional Management and Inconsistent Treatment of Guests
reviews.text:
I’ve been staying at Studio M Arabian Plaza for a long time, not because of comfort or preference, but mainly because of the location. 
Unfortunately, my experience with parts of the staff and management team has been disappointing.

I often felt that guests are treated differently depending on the situation, and at times the behavior from some staff members felt unprofessional and unwelcoming. In some cases, it even felt like they hold grudges or try to take revenge if a guest raises concerns or is unhappy with something.

What makes the experience more frustrating is that different management staff seem to apply different rules, creating inconsistency and confusion for guests. I also noticed that guests booking through platforms like Agoda may sometimes be treated differently, which should never happen in hospitality.

The only exception, in my experience, has been the General Manager, who has always been respectful, calm, kind, and willing to listen professionally.
I hope the hotel management takes guest feedback seriously and improves fairness, professionalism, and consistency in the future.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
My stay at this hotel left me with a disappointing experience. Initially, I had booked a one-night stay, but on the day of check-out, I decided to extend my stay for another night.

I called the hotel's reservation department to confirm the extension and agreed upon the rate for the additional night. During our conversation, I was assured that I could settle the payment at any time throughout the day.

However, my experience took a turn for the worse when, just two hours later, there was a sudden and aggressive knocking on my room door, accompanied by incessant doorbell ringing. Naturally, I was alarmed and thought there might be an emergency involving civil defense or law enforcement.

To my surprise, when I opened the door, I was confronted by a receptionist named Gasim, who was inquiring about the payment for my extended reservation. His approach was not only rude but also unprofessional. I tried explaining that I had been told over the phone that I could make the payment at my convenience during the day, but Gasim seemed uninterested in my explanation and insisted on immediate payment.

Having travelled to many hotels in various countries, I have never encountered such unacceptable behaviour from a hotel staff member. Gasim's actions left me questioning how someone with such a demeanor and lack of professionalism could be employed in a customer-facing role at this establishment.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Looks old. Cleanliness needs to be improved. We were placed in a smoking room initially even if I requested for a non-smoking room during the booking for health reasons. When I asked at the reception, they mentioned that special request has no guarantee. They are are giving rooms depwnding on availability.  Anyhow, we were transferred the next day. This just surprised me as I believe health should be considered with utmost importance for customers. I think this should be improved as well.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We are glad to hear that you stayed with us, but we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience you experienced regarding the smoking room and your health concerns. We completely understand how important non-smoking accommodations are, and we regret that your initial request was not met immediately. We will review our room allocation and booking procedures to ensure special requests related to health are given higher priority in the future.

Additionally, we appreciate your comments regarding cleanliness and the overall condition of the property. Your feedback will be shared with our housekeeping and maintenance teams to help us improve and maintain high standards for all our guests.

We truly value your stay and hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back to Studio M Hotel Arabian Plaza, providing a seamless, comfortable, and healthier experience next time.

Warm regards,
Hotel Management
Studio M Hotel Arabi

reviews.title: Bad and Rude Experience
reviews.negatives:
Unfortunately, it was a bad experience to stay there , our reservation was  premium apartment and  booked 4 days before arrival, (two rooms, a lounge and a pantry)  overlooking the Dubai airport for a family of 2 adults and 6 children, the oldest 14 and the youngest 4 and a half years, and when we arrived on July 24 at 8:30 at night, we were surprised that we were given an apartment on the smokers  floor, and the room was shabby and dirty (I expect it was a bar) and the smell of cigarettes in was terrible, after a dispute with the reception to change the room, they informed us at 12 a.m. of the availability of a clean apartment on the non-smoking fourth floor (379), but it has fewer specifications and smaller than our reservation , and it overlooks neighboring apartments until the next morning of the second day, until the time the guests checkout , we will be transferred later, so I  had wakeup  my kids midnight  to move.
